title: LOCAL AI OS

target_user.icp: One technical owner of a private Linux workstation with a repeated, expensive context, recovery, or local-AI workflow.

problem: The owner loses verified project context or recovery confidence across restarts and cannot safely turn private local-AI tooling into a measured repeatable workflow.
outcome: A bounded documented local-first workflow with a visible result, acceptance report, and recoverable operating boundary.
primary_wedge: One measured diagnostic for one repeated context or recovery workflow; not a sale of the entire stack.

time_to_first_value.result: A scoped diagnostic baseline and a sanitized before/after or acceptance artifact.

proof.schema: Agreed baseline -> bounded implementation -> measured acceptance -> sanitized report

distribution_loop.loop: Useful diagnostic artifact -> owner shares with a relevant peer -> qualified diagnostic introduction.

founder_content_loop.format: Founder education and problem interviews based on approved sanitized proof; no broad autonomy claims.

conversion_event.event: Qualified diagnostic request with one repeated workflow and acceptance metric
conversion_event.route: Founder-led diagnostic intake only; public route remains proof/education until verified.

activation.truth_source: Accepted diagnostic baseline and first visible artifact

retention.truth_source: Explicit support/expansion record after accepted delivery

revenue.truth_source: Owner-approved payment/receipt record outside tracked files

surfaces.homepage_role: Proof-first outcome acquisition surface; it must route to a detailed multi-page technical portal rather than impersonating a full client delivery.

requirements: technical portal covers architecture, runtime, context/RAG, Codex, Atlas, security, deployment, acceptance, operations and recovery
public repository is not represented as a complete client delivery

security_privacy.public_private_boundary: Public proof is sanitized; no raw prompts, responses, private runtime paths, credentials, PII, or client machine data.
security_privacy.secret_scan: Existing source/generated guard and product doctor secret scan.

delivery.model: 9,900 RUB diagnostic credited toward a bounded five-day pilot only after scope and acceptance are agreed.

acceptance.criteria: Declared files, promotion debt, secret risk, restore dry-run, UI/runtime behavior and written report.

operations.rollback: Bounded implementation rollback plan agreed before client changes.
operations.recovery: Restore dry-run and recovery evidence are part of acceptance.

owner_blockers: Choose one external ICP and repeated workflow from interviews.
Record a verified external acceptance report before any paid acquisition.

paid_acquisition.reason: Incubation; external proof, acceptance and owner gates are not complete.

unavailable_claims.claim: Customer activation, retention, referral, revenue, broad autonomy and client-ready delivery are unverified.
